advancement.create_classic_blaze_enchant: It's from the last era. Obtain a Classic Blaze Enchanter
create_classic_blaze_enchanter.ponder.cl: Classic Blaze Enchanter can be automated with Mechanical Arm. It can insert item for enchanting and feed experience fuel
Classic Blaze Enchanter also can be automated with Belt
Experience fuel cannot be fed via belt
This is a Classic Blaze Enchanter. It continuously enchants items according to designated Enchanting Template
Super Enchanting can cause lightning strikes
You can cover the Classic Blaze Enchanter with block to avoid lightning strikes, but then level of existing enchantment may drop
Provide it Liquid Experience to activate it
Before enchanting with it, Enchanting Template must be set via filter slot
Enchantment on the Enchanting Template will be enchanted to item and will not consume the Enchanting Template or the enchantment
If multiple enchantments are applicable, random one will be applied
Classic Blaze Enchanter enters Super Enchanting mode in same way as Blaze Enchanter, requiring Cake O' Enchanting
Classic Blaze Enchanter in Super Enchanting mode exclusively requires Super Enchanting Templates
If the item already has an enchantment of the same type and level, Super Enchanting increases the enchantment by one level, up to one level beyond level cap
Make sure to place a Lightning Rod nearby
